title: Modern vanilla
description: Brings vanilla to its absolute perfection
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68e34f9ba9c277b0ebeeef8391d2941952500301.png)
This adds a lot of Vanilla-like graphics. have fun exploring everything about the pack

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/209c72919242f6141c377afc7cd4a06cd9b0fa52.png)](https://discord.gg/VVsJCFDMRY) Chat with us on Discord!



**Q&A**

Q = Does the modpack add mods to change the game by a lot

A = No, this modpack adds only quality of life features and retextures to make minecraft look more modern


Q = Does this modpack improve preformance

A = Yes it does this mod improves preformance by a lot


Q = Does this modpack support shaders

A = Yes of course, there are a lot of shaders integrated in the modpack but you can add your own


**Credit**

you should defenetly check out [Vanilla tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
its a great recourse pack website if you want to get your own **_Tweaks_**
